# https://t-atlas.github.io/ llms.txt

- [Researcher Profile](https://t-atlas.github.io/): Junhong Lian's academic homepage and research profile.
- [Publications](https://t-atlas.github.io/publications/): Publications and preprints on personalized generation, news headline generation, and AI for research.
- [Preprints](https://t-atlas.github.io/publications/#preprints): AI4AIR survey preprint information.
- [News](https://t-atlas.github.io/news/): Academic updates and paper acceptance news.
- [Blog Posts](https://t-atlas.github.io/year-archive/): Personal blog posts in English.
- [中文博客](https://t-atlas.github.io/zh/year-archive/): Chinese blog posts.
- [My First Blog Post](https://t-atlas.github.io/posts/2025/03/first-blog-post/): First English blog post.
- [我的第一篇博客](https://t-atlas.github.io/zh/posts/2025/03/first-blog-post/): 第一篇中文博客。
- [CV](https://t-atlas.github.io/cv/): Curriculum vitae.
- [中文主页](https://t-atlas.github.io/zh/): 中文版个人主页。
- [AI4AIR Survey](https://t-atlas.github.io/publication/2026-06-01-ai4air-survey): Preprint survey on AI for AI research.
- [SCAPE Paper](https://t-atlas.github.io/publication/2025-08-09-improved-personalized): CIKM 2025 paper on personalized headline generation.
- [Panoramic Interests Paper](https://t-atlas.github.io/publication/2025-04-28-panoramic-interests): WWW 2025 paper on stylistic-content aware personalized headline generation.
- [Fact-Preserved News Headlines](https://t-atlas.github.io/publication/2023-12-01-fact-preserved): ICDM 2023 paper on factual consistency in personalized news headline generation.
